drag to rotate · auto-spins when idle · click a point

tatara 鑪

world manufacturing plants & logistics flows, by sector
resilience map, NOT a target-list · source: seed-plant-graph.kotoba.edn

Overview

Chokepoint export-dependence

Selected

click a point → kotoba object data

Legend

HONEST: self-contained canvas globe; bounded :representative seed; coordinates rounded to city/campus scale. Worker figures are DISCLOSED AGGREGATE facility employment (a SIZE), never per-worker data (G4). Live ingest G7-gated. ADR-2606171800.
